pr.description: Pull-request blocking profile. Only baseline probes required on every verified PR run.

cloud-surface.description: PR policy records the narrow, nightly-evidence-backed ResponseAPI beta subset without blocking routine refactors on deferred helpers.
deferredRisks: Response API stream promotion still depends on a separate tracked decision and nightly evidence.
JSON, messages, reasoning, chat-completion, and other provider-only ResponseAPI helpers remain deferred.

node-integrations.description: PR policy records MCP interop evidence boundaries without blocking on host-level interop yet.
deferredRisks: NodeMCPHost only forwards already-resolved HTTP bearer tokens through `token` or `tokenProvider`; OAuth discovery, authorization, refresh, callback, and device-code flows remain out of scope for this package.
HTTP interop evidence is collected per server; cross-server routing remains a higher-level integration concern.

nightly.description: Nightly profile. Requires the broader live-evidence set for surfaces already productized in Phase 1.

cloud-surface.description: Nightly policy keeps ResponseAPI beta scoped to the narrowest evidence-backed core subset.
deferredRisks: Response API stream promotion still depends on a separate tracked decision and nightly evidence.
JSON, messages, reasoning, chat-completion, and other provider-only ResponseAPI helpers remain deferred.

node-integrations.description: Nightly policy requires transport-level MCP interop evidence while holding host-level interop at beta until a later promotion package approves stricter gating.
deferredRisks: NodeMCPHost only forwards already-resolved HTTP bearer tokens through `token` or `tokenProvider`; OAuth discovery, authorization, refresh, callback, and device-code flows remain out of scope for this package.
HTTP interop evidence is collected per server; cross-server routing remains a higher-level integration concern.
